Pheebs: Okay, now’s not the time Joey. All right? You can yell at me tomorrow.
Speaker 2: No! No! No Pheebs, I’m not gonna yell at you. I just y’know, started thinking about you and David and I…remember how bummed you were the first time he left. And I just… Oh Pheebs, come here. Are you okay?
Pheebs: No I’m not okay. The only guy I’ve ever been crazy about has gone to Minsk and I may never…I may never see him again.
Speaker 2: Hey, y’know you could always visit him.
Pheebs: Oh right, like they’re gonna let me have a passport.
Speaker 2: Anything I can do? Whatever you need.
Pheebs: Well—But—Now, if-if you can achieve positronic distillation of sub-atomic particles y’know before he does, then he can come back.
Speaker 2: I can give it a shot.
